fields.label: Certificate Type Name
fields.description: Display name of the certificate type (e.g., CE Marking, ISO 9001)

fields.label: Type Code
fields.description: Unique code for the certificate type (e.g., CE, ISO-9001, GOTS, OEKO-TEX)

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Whether this certificate type is active and can be used

fields.label: Is Mandatory
fields.description: Whether this certificate is mandatory for products/sellers in applicable categories

fields.label: Certificate Category
fields.options:
Compliance
Quality
Environmental
Social
Safety
Organic
Sustainability
Industry Specific
Other
fields.description: Category of the certificate for grouping and filtering

fields.label: Applicable To
fields.description: Whether this certificate applies to products, sellers, or both

fields.label: Standards Body
fields.description: Organization that defines the standard (e.g., ISO, OEKO-TEX Association)

fields.label: Issuing Authority
fields.description: Authority or organization that issues this certificate

fields.label: Icon
fields.description: Certificate type icon or logo (recommended size: 200x200 pixels)

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Detailed description of the certificate and what it certifies

fields.label: Requirements
fields.description: Requirements and criteria for obtaining this certificate

fields.label: Default Validity (Months)
fields.description: Default validity period in months for this certificate type

fields.label: Renewal Reminder (Days)
fields.description: Days before expiry to send renewal reminder notifications

fields.label: Requires Physical Audit
fields.description: Whether obtaining this certificate requires a physical audit

fields.label: Requires Renewal
fields.description: Whether this certificate needs periodic renewal

fields.label: Tenant
fields.description: Tenant for multi-tenant isolation (empty for global certificate types)

fields.label: Tenant Name
fields.description: Auto-filled from Tenant

fields.label: Is Global
fields.description: Global certificate types are visible to all tenants

fields.label: Website
fields.description: Official website for more information about this certificate

fields.label: Reference Standard
fields.description: Reference standard number or code (e.g., ISO 9001:2015)

fields.label: Verification URL
fields.description: URL where certificates of this type can be verified online

fields.label: Documentation URL
fields.description: URL for official documentation and guidelines

fields.label: Display Order
fields.description: Sort order for display (lower numbers appear first)

fields.label: Show in Filters
fields.description: Display this certificate type in product/seller filters

fields.label: Featured
fields.description: Highlight this certificate type in listings

fields.label: Certificate Count
fields.description: Number of active certificates of this type
